task: place the milk dairy in the white plate
raw:
Scene: red_milk_carton, white_plate, blue_bin, green_cup, brown_object, table
Step 1: reach(red_milk_carton)
  affordance_region: the red milk carton
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_milk_carton, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_milk_carton) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_milk_carton)
  affordance_region: the body of the red milk carton
  contact: holding(red_milk_carton) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_milk_carton)
Step 3: transport(red_milk_carton -> white_plate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white plate
  spatial: above(red_milk_carton, white_plate, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_milk_carton)
  done_when: above(red_milk_carton, white_plate, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_milk_carton -> white_plate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white plate
  contact: surface_contact(red_milk_carton, white_plate) [completion]; released(red_milk_carton) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_milk_carton) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_milk_carton, white_plate) AND released(red_milk_carton) AND stable(red_milk_carton)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red milk carton
an empty area on the white plate
an empty area on the white plate
steps.done_when: surface_contact(red_milk_carton, white_plate) AND released(red_milk_carton) AND stable(red_milk_carton)
